LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS LAW OFFICES OF WIEGEL AND FRIED & CLIFFORD FRIED'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF SERGIO IANTORNO. RULING: THE COURT AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING & ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED IN PART. OVERRULED AS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (LEGAL MALPRACTICE). THE CONTINUING REPRESENTATION TOLLING PROVISION OF CCP SECTION 340.6(A)(2) APPLIES IN THAT THE SAME SPECIFIC SUBJECT MATTER WAS ADDRESSED IN THE 2 SUITS. BOTH INVOLVED SETTLING THE PROSPECTIVE INTERESTS OF THE PARTIES IN 816 SCOTT STREET, INCLUDING A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL EVICTION IN MARTINS ACTION. THE CONTINUING REPRESENTATION TOLLING PROVISION APPLIES. RULING MADE WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BRINGING FUTURE DISPOSITIVE MOTION REGARDING STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS ADDRESSING FACTUAL ISSUES. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND, 3RD AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION TO PLEAD FRAUD WITH SPECIFITY AND ALLEGE MISREPRESENTATIONS. PLEADING MUST STATE MORE THAN MERE LEGAL CONCLUSIONS. PLAINTIFF HAS 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT HAS 30 DAYS TO ANSWER. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, COURT REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR #4780

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-10-503673 WITH CASE CGC-10-498508
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SERGIO IANTORNO'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-10-503673 WITH CASE CGC-10-498508. Appearances: Angelito R. Sevilla of Dillingham & Murphy (397.2700) for defendant and responding party; Ory Sandel of Idell & Seitel LLP (986.2400) for plaintiff and moving party. Argued and the court modified its ruling as follows: denied with prejudice. Order signed in open court. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

Andrea Fellion, Esq. of Dillingham & Murphy, 415-397-2700 for defendant and opposing party Law Offices of Wiegel & Fried

Ruling:
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling:
PLAINTIFF SERGIO IANTORNO'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. OVERRULE AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE #2; SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO REMAINDER; OVERRULE AS TO RESERVING RIGHT TO ADD DEFENSES. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797 (302/PHA)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS LAW OFFICES OF WIEGEL AND FRIED & CLIFFORD FRIED'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF SERGIO IANTORNO.

APPEARANCES: P. Richard Colombatto, Esq. of Colombatto Sims LLP 391-6182 for pltf & opposing party; Patrick J. Suter, Esq. of Dillingham & Murphy, LLP 397-2700 for defts & moving parties (seeking clarification; no argument).

RULING: The Court amended its tentative ruling & adopted as follows: OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED IN PART. OVERRULED AS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (LEGAL MALPRACTICE). THE CONTINUING REPRESENTATION TOLLING PROVISION OF CCP SECTION 340.6(a)(2) APPLIES IN THAT THE SAME SPECIFIC SUBJECT MATTER WAS ADDRESSED IN THE 2 SUITS. BOTH INVOLVED SETTLING THE PROSPECTIVE INTERESTS OF THE PARTIES IN 816 SCOTT STREET, INCLUDING A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL EVICTION IN MARTINS ACTION. THE CONTINUING REPRESENTATION TOLLING PROVISION APPLIES. RULING MADE WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BRINGING FUTURE DISPOSITIVE MOTION REGARDING STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS ADDRESSING FACTUAL ISSUES. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND, 3RD AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION TO PLEAD FRAUD WITH SPECIFITY AND ALLEGE MISREPRESENTATIONS. PLEADING MUST STATE MORE THAN MERE LEGAL CONCLUSIONS. Plaintiff has 30 days leave to amend complaint. Defendant has 30 days to answer. Plaintiff to prepare proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR #4780
